project_privacy_data_flows.description: 用户登录时，用户名和密码通过API POST请求发送到MediaWiki服务器进行clientlogin认证，成功后凭据被存储到iOS Keychain

flow_steps.code: public func login(username: String, password: String, retypePassword: String?, oathToken: String?, emailAuthCode: String?, captchaID: String?, captchaWord: String?, hCaptchaToken: String? = nil, reattemptOn401Response: Bool = false, completion: @escaping (Result<WMFCurrentUser, Error>) -> Void)
flow_steps.details: 登录流程触发，接收用户输入的用户名和密码
将用户名和密码组装到API请求参数中

flow_steps.code: performTokenizedMediaWikiAPIPOST(tokenType: .login, to: siteURL, with: parameters, reattemptLoginOn401Response: reattemptOn401Response) { [weak self] (result, response, error) in
flow_steps.details: 用户名和密码通过HTTPS POST发送到wiki服务器（如en.wikipedia.org）的API端点进行clientlogin认证
登录成功后，用户名和密码被存储到iOS Keychain中用于后续自动登录
登录成功后，centralauth_ cookies被复制到其他目标域，用于跨域认证

project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 用户名和密码凭据（从Keychain读取）
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 应用启动或会话过期时，从Keychain读取保存的凭据进行自动登录

flow_steps.code: public func loginWithSavedCredentials(reattemptOn401Response: Bool = false, emailToken: String? = nil, oathToken: String? = nil, backgroundAuthInstrument: WMFTestKitchen.InstrumentImpl? = nil, completion: @escaping (Result<WMFCurrentUser, Error>) -> Void)
flow_steps.details: 自动登录流程触发，从Keychain读取保存的凭据

flow_steps.code: guard hasKeychainCredentials, let userName = KeychainCredentialsManager.shared.username, let password = KeychainCredentialsManager.shared.password
flow_steps.details: 从KeychainCredentialsManager读取Keychain中保存的用户名和密码

flow_steps.code: self.login(username: userName, password: password, retypePassword: nil, oathToken: oathToken, emailAuthCode: emailToken, captchaID: nil, captchaWord: nil, reattemptOn401Response: reattemptOn401Response, completion: { (loginResult) in
flow_steps.details: 从Keychain读取的用户名和密码通过API POST发送到MediaWiki服务器进行认证

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 用户登录过程中触发多个分析事件，记录登录操作、类别和耗时

flow_steps.code:
public func logSuccess(category: EventCategoryMEP?, timeElapsed: Double?) {
    logEvent(category: category ?? .login, label: nil, action: .loginSuccess, measure: timeElapsed)
flow_steps.details: 登录成功时触发分析事件记录

flow_steps.code: let event = LoginFunnel.Event(measure_time: measureTime, action: action, label: label, category: category)

flow_steps.details: 登录事件通过EventPlatformClient提交到ios.login_action流，最终由StorageManager持久化并通过HTTP POST发送到 https://intake-analytics.wikimedia.org/v1/events
事件数据被持久化存储到本地Core Data数据库(EventPlatformEvents.sqlite)中等待上传
存储的事件通过HTTP POST发送到事件接入服务

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 登录成功后，服务器设置会话Cookie用于维持认证状态

flow_steps.code: performTokenizedMediaWikiAPIPOST(tokenType: .login, to: siteURL, with: parameters, reattemptLoginOn401Response: reattemptOn401Response) { [weak self] (result, response, error) in
flow_steps.details: 登录API调用成功后，服务器返回包含Set-Cookie头的响应，设置centralauth_系列Cookie
centralauth_ cookies被存储到HTTPCookieStorage并复制到多个目标域（如en.wikipedia.org, meta.wikimedia.org等）

flow_steps.code: public func request(with requestURL: URL, method: Session.Request.Method = .get, bodyParameters: Any? = nil, bodyData: Data? = nil, bodyEncoding: Session.Request.Encoding = .json, headers: [String: String] = [:], cachePolicy: URLRequest.CachePolicy? = nil) -> URLRequest
flow_steps.details: 后续API请求自动附带保存在HTTPCookieStorage中的认证Cookie，实现会话维持
